name: Fresh Fig Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge figs in 2 tablespoons flour, tossing lightly to coat; set aside.
2. In a medium bowl, sift together the remaining flour, baking powder, and salt four times.
3. Stir together the milk, beaten eggs, and butter; add to the dry ingredients, stirring until moistened.
4. Fold in the reserved figs.
5. Spoon batter into greased muffin pans, filling 2/3 full.
6. Bake at 450°F for 20 minutes or until golden brown. Remove from pans.
7. Serve warm.
